settings.text: Developed in partnership with Ahnah Clinic by Dr. Anmol.
Brought to Pakistan for the first time in a serious, premium format.
FDA cleared, evidence-informed light therapy devices.
5-wavelength red & near-infrared panels with separate red/NIR controls.
Flicker-free operation and a low-EMF design (0 EMF at 3+ inches).
3-year warranty with local support in Pakistan.

settings.title: Five-wavelength red and near-infrared panels, with separate controls.
settings.description: Somara One, Core, and Max deliver red and near-infrared light across five wavelengths, with separate red/NIR controls, flicker-free operation, and a low-EMF design.
settings.benefits:
Five wavelengths of red & near-infrared light
Separate red / NIR controls
Flicker-free operation, low EMF design
3-year warranty on every panel

settings.title: Targeted laser and LED face therapy complete the system.
settings.description: The Somara Cap 306 laser hair-growth cap and Aura LED face mask extend the system into scalp and skin-focused routines — the same premium standard as the panels.
settings.benefits:
Somara Cap 306 — 306-diode laser hair cap
Somara Aura — 5-wavelength LED face mask
Designed for daily, at-home routines
Backed by the same 3-year warranty

settings.title: Clinical partnership
settings.text: Developed in partnership with Ahnah Clinic by Dr. Anmol — clinical grounding, not borrowed hype.

settings.title: Try before you buy
settings.text: Experience red light therapy in person at Ahnah Clinic and choose your device with confidence.

settings.title: Early access
settings.text: Somara is bringing serious premium light therapy to Pakistan for the first time. Join early access for guidance and priority support.

settings.question: How do I choose between Somara One, Core, and Max?
settings.answer: One is a compact targeted panel, Core is a mid-size half-body panel, and Max is a full-body panel. Choose based on your space and how much of the body you want to cover — our team can help you decide.

settings.question: Are Somara devices safe to use at home?
settings.answer: Yes. The panels are flicker-free with a low-EMF design (0 EMF at 3+ inches). Always follow the usage guidance and safety notes included with each device.

settings.question: Do you offer local support in Pakistan?
settings.answer: Yes — Somara offers local delivery, product guidance, and warranty support in Pakistan, plus an in-person experience at Ahnah Clinic.

settings.question: What warranty is included?
settings.answer: Every Somara device comes with a 3-year warranty and local support.

settings.label: design — 0 EMF at 3+ inches on panels
